title: Political System Profile
description: JSON Schema for political system profiles (DR-144). Defines how a government functions and its gameplay-impacting modifiers.

description.description: Detailed description of how this government type operates

decisionSpeedModifier.description: % modifier to action processing speed. Positive = faster decisions. Autocracies high, democracies low.

stabilityBaseline.description: Baseline stability adjustment. Positive = more stable initial conditions.

civilLibertyIndex.description: Level of individual freedoms (0 = totalitarian, 100 = full liberty)

pressFreedomIndex.description: Media freedom level (0 = total state control, 100 = fully free press)

corruptionBaseline.description: Base corruption level (0 = transparent, 100 = pervasively corrupt)

successionRisk.description: Risk of instability during leadership transitions (0 = smooth, 100 = crisis-prone)

reformCapacity.description: Ability to enact reforms and adapt to changing conditions

stabilityRecoveryRate.description: Modifier to stability recovery speed per turn

crisisResistance.description: Stability threshold modifier before crisis triggers

controversialActionDelay.description: Turns of delay for controversial actions (war declarations, emergency powers)

civilUnrestThreshold.description: Modifier to civil unrest escalation thresholds
